title: Crispy Roasted Coconut Algerian Skewers
description: A festive algerian dish featuring unsweetened coconut milk, roasted on skewers with a crispy texture and herbaceous flavor, perfect for breakfast or a snack.

ingredients.name: Pinch of salt and black pepper

instructions: Prepare chicken skewers by threading the pieces onto metal or wooden skewers.
Mix coconut milk, olive oil, parsley, mint leaves, garlic, salt, pepper, and almonds in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Place chicken skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
Drizzle the marinade evenly over the chicken and bake for about 35-40 minutes, or until cooked through. You can check doneness by pressing with a fork; it should come out clean.
Remove from oven and serve warm as an appetizer or snack.
